mapper.sql: select stock_flow_id, flow_no, business_type, part_id, part_code, part_name, spec_model, part_unit, change_quantity, before_stock, after_stock, business_time, handler_name, adjust_direction, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from wh_stock_flow
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
and flow_no like concat('%', #{flowNo}, '%')
and business_type = #{businessType}
and part_code like concat('%', #{partCode}, '%')
and part_name like concat('%', #{partName}, '%')
and handler_name like concat('%', #{handlerName}, '%')
and date_format(business_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginBusinessTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and date_format(business_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= date_format(#{params.endBusinessTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
order by business_time desc, stock_flow_id desc
